title: Map Implementation in Java
summary: Java provides a powerful data structure called Map, which is used to store key-value pairs. A Map is a collection of unique keys and their corresponding values, and it provides efficient methods to add, remove, and access elements in constant time.
content: Java provides a powerful data structure called Map, which is used to store key-value pairs. A Map is a collection of unique keys and their corresponding values, and it provides efficient methods to add, remove, and access elements in constant time.
